title: Fei-Fei Li Helped Create AI, N… - The Mishal Husain Show - Apple Podcasts
excerpts:
Section Title: Fei-Fei Li Helped Create AI, Now She Feels the Responsibility
Content:
[The Mishal Husain Show](https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-mishal-husain-show/id1845840408)
Play
Stanford University Professor Fei-Fei Li has been at the forefront of artificial intelligence research for 25 years, which is why she’s been called the “godmother of AI.”
In this conversation she tells Mishal Husain how she arrived in the US as a teenager after her parents decided to emigrate from China. She also talks about the high school teacher who inspired her and a deep love of physics, leading her to ask what she calls “audacious” questions.
These days, amid her excitement about AI and its potential, she also is focused on what humans must do to build safeguards, and has a message for parents, too.

title: Fei-Fei Li is a Chinese-born American computer scientist best known for establishing ImageNet, the dataset that enabled rapid advances in computer vision in the 2010s.
excerpts: **Fei-Fei Li** ( Chinese : 李飞飞 ; pinyin : *Lǐ Fēifēi* ; born July 3, 1976) <sup>[[ 2 ]]()</sup> is a Chinese-born American computer scientist <sup>[[ 3 ]]()</sup> best known for establishing ImageNet , the dataset that enabled rapid advances in computer vision in the 2010s. <sup>[[ 4 ]]()</sup> <sup>[[ 5 ]]()</sup> <sup>[[ 6 ]]()</sup> <sup>[[ 7 ]]()</sup> She is a professor of computer science at Stanford University , <sup>[[ 8 ]]()</sup> with research expertise in artificial intelligence , machine learning , deep learning , computer vision, and cognitive neuroscience . <sup>[[ 9 ]]()</sup>

title: The Godmother of AI | Princeton Alumni
excerpts:
Section Title: The Godmother of AI > The Godmother of AI
Content:
As the [Sequoia Capital Professor in Computer Science at Stanford University](https://profiles.stanford.edu/fei-fei-li) and co-director of the [Stanford Institute for Human-Centered Artificial Intelligence](https://hai.stanford.edu/) (HAI) — an interdisciplinary research hub that engages the social sciences and humanities — she’s spent more than 25 years doing just that while driving breakthroughs in cognitively inspired AI, computer vision, deep learning and AI systems for healthcare delivery. She is an elected member of the National Academy of Engineering, the National Academy of Medicine and the American Academy of Arts and Sciences. In 2023, she was the recipient of the Intel Innovation Lifetime Achievement Award.

title: The Tim Ferriss Show Transcripts: Dr. Fei-Fei Li, The Godmother of AI
excerpts:
Section Title: The Tim Ferriss Show Transcripts: Dr. Fei-Fei Li, The Godmother of AI — Asking Audacious Question...
Content:
Leave a comment
Topics: [The Tim Ferriss Show Transcripts](https://tim.blog/category/the-tim-ferriss-show-transcripts/)
Please enjoy this transcript of [my interview with Dr. Fei-Fei Li](https://tim.blog/2025/12/09/dr-fei-fei-li-the-godmother-of-ai/) ( [@drfeifei](https://x.com/drfeifei) ), the inaugural Sequoia Professor in the Computer Science Department at Stanford University, a founding co-director of Stanford’s Human-Centered AI Institute, and the co-founder and CEO of [**World Labs**](https://www.worldlabs.ai/) , a generative AI company focusing on Spatial Intelligence. Dr. Li served as the director of Stanford’s AI Lab from 2013 to 2018. She was vice president at Google and Chief Scientist of AI/ML at Google Cloud during her sabbatical from Stanford in 2017/2018.

title: Fei-fei Li | Professor of Computer Science, Stanford
excerpts:
Section Title: ... > Fei-fei Li
Content:
Professor of Computer Science, Stanford University
Fei-Fei Li is a Professor of Computer Science at Stanford University and Co-Director of the Stanford Human-Centered AI Institute. She is globally recognized for her pioneering work in computer vision, particularly as the creator of ImageNet, which helped catalyze the deep learning revolution. Li has served as Chief Scientist of AI/ML at Google Cloud, shaping its AI research and product strategy. Her research focuses on AI that augments human capabilities while aligning with ethical principles. She is a strong advocate for diversity in AI and co-founded AI4ALL, a nonprofit that expands access to AI education for underrepresented groups. Her work bridges cutting-edge research with societal impact, influencing global AI policy discussions.

title: American Podcast "Exponential Perspectives" Interviewed Fei-Fei Li: Epidemic, AI Ethics, and Talent Training | News | HyperAI
excerpts:
Section Title: ... > **Fei-Fei Li: The pandemic has allowed me to use AI to help and protect the elderly**
Content:
Azeem Azhar: Hi, my name is Azeem Azhar, and you are listening to the Exponential Views podcast.
Dr. Fei-Fei Li is a well-known researcher in the field of artificial intelligence. She is currently the first Sequoia Chair Professor of Computer Science at Stanford University and co-director of the Human-Centered Artificial Intelligence Institute (HAI). She is best known for initiating the ImageNet project.
I believe that ImageNet is one of the catalysts and driving forces behind the boom in investment, research and application of artificial intelligence over the past eight years.
Earlier this year, she was elected to the National Academy of Engineering, one of the highest professional honors in her field. Feifei, it's great to have you here today, thank you for taking the time.
Fei-Fei Li: Thank you, it’s so exciting. I really like your show too.
